languages.text: "К чему рисковать своими слугами? Лучше помоги своим врагам найти друг друга. Обманывай их, выводи друг на друга. А пока они заняты — разведуй руины или добей выживших".
"Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."
languages.original_text: "К чему рисковать своими слугами? Лучше помоги своим врагам найти друг друга. Обманывай их, выводи друг на друга. А пока они заняты — разведуй руины или добей выживших".

traits.locale_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."
"Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."
"Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

languages.text: 「自分の家来を危険にさらす必要はない。敵同士を導き、罠を仕掛け、敵同士を導き、敵同士を戦わせる。敵同士が戦っている間に、遺跡を偵察したり、生き残った敵を殺したりする」
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: 「自分の家来を危険にさらす必要はない。敵同士を導き、罠を仕掛け、敵同士を導き、敵同士を戦わせる。敵同士が戦っている間に、遺跡を偵察したり、生き残った敵を殺したりする。」

languages.text: «¿Por qué arriesgar tus sirvientes? Sería mejor ayudar a tus enemigos a encontrarse entre ellos. Engáñalos, llévalos al camino de los otros. Y mientras están ocupados, explora las ruinas o mata a los supervivientes».
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué arriesgar tus sirvientes? Sería mejor ayudar a tus enemigos a encontrarse entre ellos. Engáñalos, llévalos al camino de los otros. Y mientras están ocupados, explora las ruinas o mata a los supervivientes».

languages.text: “何必让你的仆从涉险？不如帮助你的敌人找到彼此。设下圈套，引它们狭路相逢。趁它们打得热闹了，我们正好侦察遗迹，也能顺手剿灭幸存者。”
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: “何必让你的仆从涉险？不如帮助你的敌人找到彼此。设下圈套，引它们狭路相逢。趁它们打得热闹了，我们正好侦察遗迹，也能顺手剿灭幸存者。”

languages.text: "Wozu Eure Diener riskieren? Helfen wir lieber Euren Feinde, sich gegenseitig zu finden. Sorgt dafür, dass sie sich begegnen. Und während sie beschäftigt sind, erkundet die Ruinen oder tötet die Überlebenden."
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: "Wozu Eure Diener riskieren? Helfen wir lieber Euren Feinde, sich gegenseitig zu finden. Sorgt dafür, dass sie sich begegnen. Und während sie beschäftigt sind, erkundet die Ruinen oder tötet die Überlebenden."

languages.text: "Neden hizmetkârları riske atalım? Düşmanların birbirini bulmasına yardım etmek daha iyi olur. Onları kandıralım, yollarını kesiştirelim. Onlar meşgulken harabeleri araştıralım veya sağ kalanları öldürelim."
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: "Neden hizmetkârları riske atalım? Düşmanların birbirini bulmasına yardım etmek daha iyi olur. Onları kandıralım, yollarını kesiştirelim. Onlar meşgulken harabeleri araştıralım veya sağ kalanları öldürelim."

languages.text: « Pourquoi risquer de perdre vos serviteurs ? Aidez plutôt vos ennemis à se rencontrer. Dupez-les et faites en sorte que leurs routes se croisent. Pendant qu'ils seront occupés, profitez-en pour explorer les ruines ou tuer les survivants. »
languages.original_text: "Why risk your servants? It would be better to help your enemies find each other. Trick them and lead them into each other's path. While they're busy, scout out the ruins or kill the survivors."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi risquer de perdre vos serviteurs ? Aidez plutôt vos ennemis à se rencontrer. Dupez-les et faites en sorte que leurs routes se croisent. Pendant qu'ils seront occupés, profitez-en pour explorer les ruines ou tuer les survivants. »
